id.description: DID URI for the Trust Registry or TRQP endpoint, as defined by W3C DID Core: https://www.w3.org/TR/did-core/

name.description: Human-readable name of the Trust Registry.

description.description: A description of the Trust Registry.

controllers.description: List of unique identifiers representing the controllers of the Trust Registry.

authority_id.description: Primary authority/ecosystem DID served by this registry. This is used as `authority_id` in TRQP queries when applicable.

governance_framework_id.description: Identifier for the primary ecosystem governance framework, when published by this registry.

supported_did_methods.description: DID methods supported by this registry, as defined by W3C DID Core. Support for a DID method does not imply support at every assurance level.
